song.title: The Offering of Isaac
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) With difficulty I forward tread Near to the side of my beloved; Within my heart does sorrow flow|| Knowing our journey soon must end; Shoulder to shoulder I meditate, How he’s the focus of my life.
[V2] 2) I see the wood he bears for the pyre; I hold the torch, the blade in hand; His questioning does grieve my soul,|| And his dear sweetness breaks my heart; Many a year in my bosom lay Treasured by God, admired by men.
[V3] 3) My God, what strange design has moved You to demand this offering? Common as I, I ne’er dared hope|| Pledged by You for my aging days; It is Yourself come forward to give With Your appearing You promised to me
[V4] 4) As in a dream I walk, and yet By cov’nant, Your provision know; But my own hands the altar raise;|| Wood I lay up, my son I bind. I know that once this moment’s gone, All gain will vanish by my own blow.
[V5] 5) Why o’er and o’er have You appeared, Drawn me to gain the promised land? Why have You promised blessing to me,|| Given this land e’en to my seed? Why have You named me Abraham, Granted me faith and righteousness?
[V6] 6) I’m just a common man on earth, And every step I take seems hard. Your loving hand, not letting go,|| Draws me to walk this path of faith. Wand’ring alone, my body dead, I out of death to life was led.
[V7] 7) Remember, Lord, Your promises; Do You forget Your doings or plan? Remember how You spoke to me,|| Caused me to wander in this land. Now You took him who made it all real; Replacing him with Yourself alone.
[V8] 8) I raise my hand, I clench the blade, Eyes full of tears, t’ward my beloved; Son, once I promised all to you,|| Knowing you are God’s top desire. Now I must give you back to God; You I must kill with my own hand.
[V9] 9) Where now my way, where now my hope. All that I am has ended here. Appearings, promises all past;|| Experience, gifts remembered not. Only my God, this glorious God, My goal, my portion, my treasure, my all
song.author: Titus Chu
